buildCommand: mkdir -p .vercel-out/aiox-install .vercel-out/aios-install && cp -r aiox-install/. .vercel-out/aiox-install/ && cp -r aios-install/. .vercel-out/aios-install/ && printf '<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=/aiox-install"><script>location.replace("/aiox-install")</script></head></html>' > .vercel-out/index.html

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' cdn.jsdelivr.net unpkg.com fonts.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' fonts.googleapis.com fonts.gstatic.com; font-src fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' *.supabase.co; img-src 'self' data:; frame-ancestors 'none'
